title: Can I combine viewing boards where I'm a guest with our primary monday.com account?
excerpt: We are using Monday.com for our consulting work. When a customer also has Monday.com, we might get invited to their project board(s). Is there a way I can include these boards, where I am only a guest, in a workspace wit…

posts.author: tstaley (Tad Staley)
posts.cookedHtml: We are using Monday.com for our consulting work. When a customer also has Monday.com, we might get invited to their project board(s). Is there a way I can include these boards, where I am only a guest, in a workspace within my primary account?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Tad,

I am afraid this is not currently possible. You will still need to access the boards through the account they’ve invited you to as a guest. I apologise for the setback
